name: Brown Striders
rules_text: H:2 A:0 HP:3(x3) L:2 Cast on globe. Creates three Brown Striders off the board. Before combat, Striders appear in forest adjacent to a non-friendly recruit group. After all combat, they disappear again. Withdraws at the start of combat round 3. Striders' hits give Strider's Venom (-1 hand damage, cumulative). Dispelled when killed. May be cast more than once.
